scope: Roof Cost Watchdog Emergency Safe: path-independent watchdog based on real/predicted roof cost, not owner/path/candidates.
diagnosisFromUserReports: V263 could still reach ~19-20 draw clear because roofBranchLockV263 was false/inapplicable while roof.samples stayed around 30102/30573.
The failing path had ownerId/pathLabel null or non-owner labels, V259 candidates=0, coverage uncappedRoofSamples huge; therefore V263 branch lock was too narrow.
V264 moves authority from area/path to cost: predicted samples, roof.ms, roof.samples, visibleSamples and uncappedRoofSamples.

implementation.hook: drawSlopedRoofLayer2_5D before sampling: estimates 2x2 bbox roof samples and raises loopStep/fill size independently of roof owner/path.
implementation.finalize: perlaRoofCostWatchdogFinalizeFrameV264 after roof timing captures actual roof.ms/samples/visible/uncapped and flags emergencyFailed if mandatory emergency was not applied.
